title: Const Value
description: Define a constant value with an explicit type annotation to store a fixed number.
problemStatement:
Constants are forever! Declare a constant named `MAX_POINTS` with the value `100,000`.

**Requirement:** You MUST provide a type annotation (e.g., `u32`) and use uppercase for the constant name.
hints: Constants can be declared in any scope and exist for the entire duration of the program.
